title: teucrium mairei f. angustifolium
intro: Teucrium mairei f. angustifolium, also known as the narrow-leaved maritime germander, is a subspecies of the Teucrium mairei plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Teucrium mairei f. angustifolium include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused in oil, or used in herbal supplements, making it a popular choice among those seeking natural remedies for various health concerns.
